desc: create_goal is hidden during drafting; only propose_goal_draft should be the commit path.
Topic came via /goal-set, must not be sisyphus.

C3 gate teaches the agent to skip drafting-time recon. If the gate works, total tool calls before propose_goal_draft should be 0 or 1. Note: this rubric is approximate — it counts all bash calls (pre-confirm + post-confirm). For now we tolerate up to 6 bash calls overall (post-confirm verify activity is normal).
Goal should reach completion after autoContinue.
